{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185036C602096988D39E084458"}"},"total":1046},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7586245584715449113","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本书，胎穿，没有龙傲天金手指，每一步都脚踏实地，节奏快，其他科举文200多张还在春闱，这本200章左右就开始走马上任，为老百姓做事了，这才是举全族之力托举科举的意义[赞]","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":13,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742630369E084458%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227586245584715449113%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227552987505633528857%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766313840,"group_id":"7552987505633528857","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"创作属于自己的文字浪漫世界。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+QUA5g7Eu54SqnFvsUOhri8PIv05sx5wCT+PCqjF9iF","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ff96b7b2c03e4ed9a5d76936663851d8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789158&x-signature=W6W0hX1f%2Fif9dXYzJIzDev75SRE%3D","user_id":"4257764853682023","user_name":"泱泱之夏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4257764853682023","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552987505633528857","book_info":{"abstract":"【番茄刚出评分有点低，会涨上去的】【科举】【穿越+无系统】【前期无女主，后期不一定有，有的话着墨也不多】
顾氏一族，九族都是目不识丁的文盲，族谱都是族长半猜半问写的，这样的一个家族，突然出了个读书人。
起先，村里人和顾氏族亲都不看好顾如砺，觉得顾老头两口子偏心老儿子，舍不得老儿子种地，非要送顾如砺去读书，做那异想天开的大梦。                                                                                               
岂料，顾如砺的喜报接连报送到村里来。
当众人觉得顾如砺如此大才，在顾氏一族得单开一本族谱时。
顾如砺表示，单开族谱算什么，族谱还是我写的呢。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1033fc087be5c92c47547442c6862a0c","author":"我是猪头","author_id":"","book_id":"7552987505633528857","book_name":"科举：九族文盲出了个读书郎","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#601810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"12.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7552987595618140697","read_count":"127774","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1023091"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"466","tags":"历史古代,乡村,历史,穿越,架空,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3495ae6782ec747c1cc02ad72f88ef86~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447036&x-signature=8g6UrrYNa%2BCwH%2BT0CCD5bv1oSvI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2154697942902936","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"498"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323185036C602096988D39E084458"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":99,"forwarded_count":1,
